summary: A  ₹60 lakh salary attracts a surcharge of 10% under the new tax regime in addition to slab-wise income tax and 4% health and education cess. In this case, the final tax liability comes to  ₹15.53 lakh, resulting in an effective tax rate of 25.88%.

title: Moved back to India? This buffer can help you with tax planning
summary: During the RNOR window, your Indian income is taxed exactly as it would be for any resident. Any income earned in India is taxable and must be declared in the ITR

title: EPS pension 2026: How much monthly pension can you get after 10 years of service?
summary: The EPS Pension 2026 replaces previous schemes and retains the core pension formula. Employees who need a monthly pension must have 10 years of service and retire at 58. The estimated monthly pension after 10 years is  ₹2,143, with a minimum pension floor of  ₹1,000.

title: Torrent Pharma among 6 stocks to hit 52-week highs & rally up to 25% in a month
summary: Despite a sharp sell-off in the broader market, six BSE 200 stocks touched fresh 52-week highs, highlighting resilient investor confidence. The outperformers from retail, pharmaceuticals and energy sectors continued to show strong momentum, signalling sustained buying interest despite market volatility.

title: Sensex sinks 1,680 points; Nifty closes below 23,900. 5 key factors behind today’s market mayhem
summary: Sensex Nifty Crash: Indian stock markets experienced a significant downturn on Wednesday afternoon. Rising crude oil prices and geopolitical tensions battered investor sentiment across exchanges. US President Donald Trump's remarks on Iran further fueled fears of escalation in the Middle East. This led to a sharp decline in the Sensex and Nifty indices. Broader markets and sectoral indices also traded deep in the red.

title: India's mutual fund industry just beat FIIs in a historic first. Here's what changed
summary: India's mutual fund industry has overtaken foreign institutional investors in total assets under custody for the first time, marking a historic shift in market ownership. Strong SIP inflows and sustained domestic participation have driven the milestone, even as FII holdings declined amid continued selling and changing global investment trends.

title: Top Gainers & Losers on 8 July: Aegis Logistics, HPCL, Bank of India, IndiGo, Coforge, MRF among top losers
summary: The Indian stock market faced heavy selling on Wednesday, with benchmark indices falling over 2% amid renewed U.S.-Iran tensions. The Nifty 50 dropped to 23,882, marking its biggest decline since March, and nearly all sectoral indices ended in the red, particularly the Nifty PSU Bank index.

title: Oberoi Realty’s NCR debut spurs growth visibility with solid bookings
summary: Oberoi Realty's debut NCR launch, Three Sixty North, booked  ₹8,109 crore—more than the company's entire FY26 sales. Brokerages have raised price targets and growth estimates, though a heavy MMR-focused pipeline and demand risks remain.

title: BPCL, HPCL to IOC: OMC stocks fall up to 5.5% on sharp rebound in crude oil prices
summary: State-owned oil marketing companies HPCL, BPCL, and IOC saw their shares drop as crude oil prices surged due to Middle East tensions. Investors booked profits after price declines, with HPCL down 5.4%, BPCL 4.7%, and IOC 3.5%. Existing conditions may pressure OMCs' profit margins.

title: Oil prices jump to more than $78 a barrel as Trump says ceasefire with Iran is 'over'
summary: Oil prices rose nearly 6% after US President Trump declared the interim agreement with Iran is over. Details here.

title: Defence sector Q1 results preview: Muted earnings likely on execution delays; BEL, Bharat Dynamics, GRSE among top picks
summary: Defence sector Q1 results preview: While reported earnings of defence sector may remain subdued, underlying execution momentum is gradually building, with clearer visibility on recovery expected as conversion accelerates through the year, particularly into H2FY27, analysts said.

title: Paint makers poised for a mixed Q1; won’t rush on price cuts
summary: Price hikes augur well for the June-quarter revenue growth.

title: Multibagger stock Diamond Power hits record high despite stock market crash. InCred sees 28% more upside
summary: Diamond Power's financial position has notably improved, with working capital now funded by promoters. The stock surged 6.5% to  ₹240 despite market declines, supported by an optimistic earnings outlook from InCred, which rates it an 'ADD' with a target price of  ₹300.

title: MobiKwik CFO Taku calls for MDR on UPI transactions
summary: Upasana Taku said that while the industry supports the government's financial inclusion goals, the absence of merchant discount rate means payment firms and banks continue to bear the cost of processing transactions without any revenue, even as large listed firms benefit from the zero-fee regime.

title: Tata Steel Netherlands summoned by Dutch prosecutors over pollution violations
summary: Dutch prosecutors suspect Tata Steel of multiple criminal offence, including unlawful release of harmful substances into the air, failing in its duty of care by carrying out insufficient maintenance

title: Clubbing income: Tax return mistakes that many discover only after receiving a notice
summary: As taxpayers finalize their returns this filing season, it may be worthwhile to spend a few extra minutes reviewing investments in the name of your spouse and minor children

title: Starting a SIP? Here is why building the right portfolio matters more
summary: SIPs are effective for discipline, but they don't ensure a balanced portfolio. Proper portfolio construction requires mapping goals, managing asset allocation and avoiding excessive risk. Critical review and diversification are essential to protect against poor outcomes and market volatility.

title: EPFO system upgrade: Your PF claim may be delayed after latest update — Here's how long it will take
summary: The EPFO informs users that claim processing may be delayed due to a recent database consolidation and software upgrade. Services are restored but will be handled in phases. Details here.

title: EPF Scheme 2026: Who can withdraw their entire EPF corpus? Check all 7 cases
summary: The EPF Scheme, 2026 allows members to withdraw their entire provident fund balance only under specified circumstances. Here's a detailed guide to the seven eligible situations and the key changes from the earlier rules.

title: EPF Scheme 2026: Can employers cap EPF contribution at  ₹1,800? Here's what the law says
summary: Labour Law Reporter emphasizes that while  ₹1,800 is the default PF contribution, employers must have legal grounds to reduce contributions beyond this amount. Employee protections against wage reductions remain vital under the Social Security Code.

title: What is a soft credit inquiry? Meaning, benefits and why it does not affect your credit score | Explained
summary: A soft credit inquiry allows individuals and financial institutions to review credit information without affecting credit scores. Here's how soft checks work, their impact, and how they differ from hard inquiries.

title: Income Tax Department releases Excel utility for ITR-5 for FY 2025-26. What is it for and other details
summary: The Income Tax (I-T) department has released an Excel utility for ITR-5, enabling taxpayers to file their return for the assessment year 2026-27.&nbsp;

title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
summary: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server.
